zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Anna Dutton於1450年出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas Dutton29歲，母親Anne Touchet29歲。她於1463年7月11日與Sir Thomas Molyneux在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1520年10月22日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓享年70歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾澤福頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame Anna Dutton于1450年出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Dutton29岁，母亲Anne Touchet29岁。她于1463年7月11日与Sir Thomas Molyneux在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1520年10月22日在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓享年70岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾澤福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Anna Dutton was born in 1450, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Dutton, was 29 and her mother, Anne Touchet, was 29. She married Sir Thomas Molyneux on 11 July 1463, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 22 October 1520, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Sefton, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Anna Dutton est née en 1450, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Dutton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anne Touchet, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Molyneux le 11 juillet 1463, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1520, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame Anna Dutton 1450 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Dutton 29 und ihre Mutter Anne Touchet 29. Sie hat am 11. Juli 1463 in England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Molyneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Oktober 1520 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sefton, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Anna Dutton è nata il nel 1450 nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Dutton, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Anne Touchet, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Molyneux il 11 luglio 1463, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 ottobre 1520, nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Sefton, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Dame Anna Duttonが1450年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Duttonは29歳，母Anne Touchetは29歳であった。1463年7月11日にイギリスイギリスでSir Thomas Molyneuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1520年10月22日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで70歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアセフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Anna Dutton(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Dutton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Touchet(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1463년 7월 11일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Thomas Molyneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Anna Dutton nasceu em 1450, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Dutton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Anne Touchet, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Molyneux em 11 de julho de 1463, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1520, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Anna Dutton родилась в 1450 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Dutton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Touchet, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Molyneux 11 июля 1463 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 октября 1520 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dame Anna Dutton nació en 1450, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Dutton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Anne Touchet, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Molyneux el 11 de julio de 1463, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1520, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
